mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM comment WHERE member_id = #{member_id}

select c.*, m.nickname, b.title from comment c join member m on c.member_id = m.member_id join board b on c.board_id = b.board_id join recipe r on r.recipe_id = c.recipe_id where 1=1
and ( m.nickname like concat('%'',#{keyword},'%') or b.title like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') )
and status = #{status}
order by created_date ASC
order by created_date DESC
order by status desc
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
